steps.title: Calculate 15 percent
steps.content: Convert $15\%$ to $0.15$ and multiply by the bill amount: $$0.15\cdot78.20=11.73.$$ The expected tip is 11.73 dollars.

steps.title: Choose the closest amount
steps.content: The closest choice to 11.73 dollars is 12.00 dollars, which is only 0.27 dollars away.

steps.title: Round to the nearest listed dollar amount
steps.content: The exact estimate is not one of the choices, so compare distances. $11.73$ is closest to $12.00$; it is farther from $10.00$ and $14.00$.
